items.title: More Accurate AI Insights
items.description: Insights now ground more reliably in what a photo actually shows, rather than leaning on text or camera details that don't tell the whole story.

items.title: File > Open Folder Works Every Time
items.description: Cmd-O now reliably opens the folder picker instead of doing nothing.

items.title: Fullscreen Shortcuts Fixed
items.description: F and Esc now reliably enter and exit fullscreen.

items.title: Thumbnails Refresh on Folder Switch
items.description: Thumbnails now update correctly when you switch folders.
